description_for_model: Free cryptocurrency platform API. Fetch real-time prices, news, and market data. 350+ endpoints covering live prices, news from 300+ sources (CoinDesk, Decrypt, The Block, CoinTelegraph), market sentiment, Fear & Greed index, trending topics, and AI analysis. No API key needed. Use this to answer questions about crypto prices, market data, current news, sentiment, and trends.
description_for_human: Real-time crypto prices, news, and market data. 350+ free API endpoints. No API key required. Live prices, sentiment analysis, Fear & Greed index, and trending topics.
